hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; [[ "$f" == *.yaml ]] || exit 0; [[ "$f" =~ /talos/ || "$f" =~ /kubernetes/ ]] || exit 0; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" && pre-commit run --files "$(realpath --relative-to="$root" "$f")"; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; [[ "$f" == *.md ]] || exit 0; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" && git check-ignore -q "$f" 2>/dev/null && exit 0; pre-commit run prettier --files "$(realpath --relative-to="$root" "$f")" 2>/dev/null || true; }
